Built on Solid Ground

Groundworks began with a simple mission: to provide Wichita with reliable, high-quality concrete services. Founded by local craftsman, we understand the unique challenges our climate presents, from scorching summers to freezing winters that demand resilient concrete solutions.

Frequently Asked Questions

Get answers to the most common questions about our concrete contractor services.

How long will a concrete driveway last in Wichita?

With proper installation and maintenance, a Groundworks concrete driveway can last 25-30 years or more in Wichita's climate.

What is the best way to maintain my concrete driveway?

Regular cleaning, sealing every few years, and prompt repair of any cracks will help extend the life of your driveway. Avoid de-icing salts that contain ammonium sulfate or ammonium nitrate, as these can damage concrete.

Can you add color or stamping to my concrete driveway?

Yes, we offer a variety of decorative options, including colored concrete, stamped patterns, and exposed aggregate finishes to enhance the look of your driveway.

Reviews From Our Concrete Contractor Customers

See what our satisfied customers have to say about their experience.

"Groundworks did an outstanding job replacing my old, cracked driveway. They were professional, efficient, and the new driveway looks fantastic. The crew paid close attention to detail, ensuring proper drainage and a smooth finish. Highly recommend!"

David S. Concrete Driveway

"I'm thrilled with my new concrete patio! Groundworks helped me design the perfect outdoor space for my family. The stamped concrete looks amazing, and it's so easy to maintain. The team was punctual and kept the work area clean throughout the project."

Maria G. Concrete Patio

"Groundworks repaired several sections of my sidewalk that were cracked and uneven. They did a great job matching the existing concrete, and the repairs are barely noticeable. The price was fair, and the service was prompt."

Robert B. Concrete Sidewalk Repair
